error_signature: filter function not retrieving database columns
title: Filter function not retrieving columns from Supabase
symptom: The filter function in the query configuration fails to retrieve database columns from Supabase, despite working previously. Users may see no results when applying filters.
applies_when: Filters are applied in the query configuration
root_cause: The issue arises from Supabase's row-level security policies, which restrict access to database fields based on user permissions. If the user is not logged in or does not have the necessary permissions, the fields will not be retrievable in the query configuration.
fix_steps: Ensure the user is logged in to WeWeb with the appropriate credentials
Check Supabase policies to confirm the user has access to the required columns
Reapply the filters in the query configuration
agent_instruction: Log in with the correct user credentials to access the database fields in Supabase.
